calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED.
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC.'S Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
